title: Front Office Manager - MakeMyTrip Hotels - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - MakeMyTrip Hotels - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, MakeMyTrip Hotels in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MakeMyTrip Hotels:
MakeMyTrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Hotels!
